# fly_regions (Data Source)

Lists available Fly.io regions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_regions" "all" {}

output "region_codes" {
  value = [for r in data.fly_regions.all.regions : r.code]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) The list of regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) Region code.
- `gateway` (Boolean) Whether region is a gateway.
- `name` (String) Region name.
